'''ân-v-h-p''' ('''kanavhepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quaranteam|quaranteam]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-v-h-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quaranteam|quaranteam]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-v-h-p
|-
! Lemma
| kanavhepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinavhepoko|thinavhepoko]] || [[word:jinavhepoko|jinavhepoko]] || [[word:shinavhepoko|shinavhepoko]] || [[word:kinavhepoko|kinavhepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunavhepoko|thuthunavhepoko]] || [[word:jujunavhepoko|jujunavhepoko]] || [[word:shushunavhepoko|shushunavhepoko]] || [[word:kukunavhepoko|kukunavhepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunavhepoko|thunavhepoko]] || [[word:junavhepoko|junavhepoko]] || [[word:shunavhepoko|shunavhepoko]] || [[word:kunavhepoko|kunavhepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunavhepoko|thunavhepoko]] || [[word:junavhepoko|junavhepoko]] || [[word:shunavhepoko|shunavhepoko]] || [[word:kunavhepoko|kunavhepoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonavhepoko|thothonavhepoko]] || [[word:jojonavhepoko|jojonavhepoko]] || [[word:shoshonavhepoko|shoshonavhepoko]] || [[word:kokonavhepoko|kokonavhepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonavhepoko|thonavhepoko]] || [[word:jonavhepoko|jonavhepoko]] || [[word:shonavhepoko|shonavhepoko]] || [[word:konavhepoko|konavhepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonavhepoko|thonavhepoko]] || [[word:jonavhepoko|jonavhepoko]] || [[word:shonavhepoko|shonavhepoko]] || [[word:konavhepoko|konavhepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠnavhepoko|thĂŠnavhepoko]] || [[word:jĂŠnavhepoko|jĂŠnavhepoko]] || [[word:shĂŠnavhepoko|shĂŠnavhepoko]] || [[word:kĂŠnavhepoko|kĂŠnavhepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanavhepoko|thathanavhepoko]] || [[word:jajanavhepoko|jajanavhepoko]] || [[word:shashanavhepoko|shashanavhepoko]] || [[word:kakanavhepoko|kakanavhepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanavhepoko|thanavhepoko]] || [[word:janavhepoko|janavhepoko]] || [[word:shanavhepoko|shanavhepoko]] || [[word:kanavhepoko|kanavhepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanavhepoko|thanavhepoko]] || [[word:janavhepoko|janavhepoko]] || [[word:shanavhepoko|shanavhepoko]] || [[word:kanavhepoko|kanavhepoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
